title: clausena san-ki
intro: Clausena san-ki is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and is widely used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Clausena san-ki has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
